title: xtra Crispy Russian Beets Borscht
description: A twist on the classic Russian borscht with the addition of crispy beets and a tangy red wine vinegar dressing.
instructions: In a large pot, combine beets, carrots, onion, and garlic.Boil until the beets are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Drain the beets and set them aside to cool.
In a blender or food processor, puree the cooled beets with a little bit of the beef broth until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the beet puree, diced tomatoes, red wine vinegar, sugar, salt, and black pepper.Stir in the chopped dill.
In a separate pan, heat the heavy cream over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Add the cream to the beet mixture and stir until combined.
To make the crispy beets, slice them thinly and separate them into individual pieces.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.Add the beet slices in batches and fry until crispy, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Drain the fried beets on paper towels and serve on top of the borscht.
Garnish with additional dill, if desired.
